testcase.name: test_uploads_directory_accessible

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'image' in 'text/html; charset=utf-8' + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') + where get = {'Date': 'Sat, 04 Apr 2026 16:06:37 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5_features.py:274: in test_uploads_directory_accessible assert "image" in response.headers.get("content-type", "") E AssertionError: assert 'image' in 'text/html;
